claims.text: Reported EBITDA is depressed because Meridian incurred $4.5M in one-time acquisition-related costs in Q4-2025 for Project Atlas, including legal, advisory, due diligence, and integration fees.

data.notes: All four transactions are one-time and acquisition-related, totaling $4.5M, which would be added back to calculate adjusted EBITDA.
